name: /pr-corpus-update --dry-run reports allowed=true when remaining budget exceeds estimated consumption per L-7
command: printf '%s' '{}' > b.json && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/pr-corpus-update.sh" --source cfpb-consumerfinance --estimated-tokens 50000 --budget b.json --dry-run 2>out.txt && grep -q 'source=cfpb-consumerfinance' out.txt && grep -q 'allowed=true' out.txt && echo allowed 1>&2
